description: Characterize the nucleotide binding site of the oncogenic H-Ras p21 GTPase using PDB:5P21 (complexed with the GTP analog GppNHp). Analyze the binding pocket geometry, measure the distance from the G12 position to the gamma-phosphate of the nucleotide, identify all coordinating protein residues within 3.5 Angstroms of GNP, and produce a publication-quality figure. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/ras_nucleotide.png and the report to ~/PyMOL_Data/ras_nucleotide_report.txt.
